section_title: Spot Rate Indices — GPU model scope
methodology_requirement: Five spot indices defined: H100_SXM / A100_SXM / H200_SXM / L40S / B200_SXM. Source mix per model locked in SOURCE_EXPECTED.
test_notes: SOURCE_EXPECTED dict in gold_spot_rates must match §1.1 Table 1 source assignments. Cross-check with EXPECTED_SOURCES in silver_spot_rates Cell 1.

methodology_requirement: Primary headline rate is seller_ask_noninterruptible. Interruptible rate collected and stored but not published as headline.
test_notes: Gold writes seller_ask_noninterruptible only — interruptible filtered in gold_spot_rates Cell 4 before aggregation. audit_pipeline Check Set 12 validates source_coverage on noninterruptible rows only. Interruptible data remains in Bronze/Silver for audit.

methodology_requirement: CLS-MM sourced from RunPod Cluster + Lambda Cluster. CLS-ENT sourced from CoreWeave only. Six cluster indices total.
test_notes: Verify SOURCE_ID = RUNPOD_CLUSTER. Lambda Cluster SOURCE_ID = LAMBDA_CLUSTER. CoreWeave SOURCE_ID = COREWEAVE.

methodology_requirement: CLS-MM sourced from RunPod Cluster + Lambda Cluster. CLS-ENT sourced from CoreWeave only. Six cluster indices total.
test_notes: Verify SOURCE_ID = LAMBDA_CLUSTER.

methodology_requirement: CLS-MM sourced from RunPod Cluster + Lambda Cluster. CLS-ENT sourced from CoreWeave only. Six cluster indices total.
test_notes: Verify SOURCE_ID = COREWEAVE.

section_title: Canonical Instrument Definition — methodology version stamp
methodology_requirement: methodology_version v1.0.0 stamped on every Bronze / Silver / Gold row. Changes require version bump.
test_notes: METHODOLOGY_VERSION = v1.0.0 in Cell 1. Stamped via F.lit(METHODOLOGY_VERSION) in Cell 5 select.

section_title: Canonical Instrument Definition — methodology version stamp
methodology_requirement: methodology_version v1.0.0 stamped on every Bronze / Silver / Gold row. Changes require version bump.
test_notes: All Bronze notebooks must carry matching METHODOLOGY_VERSION constant. Verify same string across all six spot Bronze notebooks.

section_title: Canonical Instrument Definition — methodology version stamp
methodology_requirement: methodology_version v1.0.0 stamped on every Bronze / Silver / Gold row. Changes require version bump.
test_notes: Silver carries METHODOLOGY_VERSION from Bronze rows; does not re-stamp independently.

section_title: One Signal Per Decision-Maker — Vast.ai machine_id dedup
methodology_requirement: One physical machine may appear as multiple block-size listings. Group by (snapshot_hash gpu_model machine_id) take median.
test_notes: Silver Cell 5: vast_deduped = vast_filtered.groupBy(snapshot_hash gpu_model machine_id). Implements §2.1 block-size dedup principle.

section_title: One Signal Per Decision-Maker — Shadeform provider dedup
methodology_requirement: Each underlying cloud provider is one economic decision-maker. Group by (snapshot_hash cloud gpu_model price_type_canonical) take median.
test_notes: Silver Cell 5: shadeform_deduped groupBy(snapshot_hash cloud gpu_model price_type_canonical). EXCLUDED_CLOUDS in bronze_shadeform Cell 1 prevents double-counting direct-collected sources.

section_title: One Signal Per Decision-Maker — Nebius L40S CPU variant dedup
methodology_requirement: Intel Ice Lake and AMD EPYC Genoa variants at identical prices = one observation. Group by (snapshot_hash gpu_model price_type_canonical).
test_notes: Silver Cell 5: nebius_deduped groupBy(snapshot_hash gpu_model price_type_canonical). Only affects L40S — H100/H200/B200 are single-variant per price type.

methodology_requirement: gpu_frac >= 1.0. Full GPU allocations only. Fractional pricing carries above-linear premium.
test_notes: VAST_MIN_GPU_FRAC = 1.0 in Silver Cell 1. Filter: .filter(F.col(gpu_frac) >= VAST_MIN_GPU_FRAC).

methodology_requirement: is_bid = False. Seller-posted prices only. Buyer bids are not executable seller offers.
test_notes: Filter: .filter(F.col(is_bid) == False).

methodology_requirement: reliability2 >= 0.90. Excludes hosts with poor uptime history.
test_notes: VAST_MIN_RELIABILITY = 0.90 in Silver Cell 1. Filter: .filter(F.col(reliability2) >= VAST_MIN_RELIABILITY).

methodology_requirement: Vast.ai contributes seller_ask_interruptible only. Does not contribute to published noninterruptible index.
test_notes: bronze_vastai hardcodes price_type_canonical = seller_ask_interruptible. Confirmed in source taxonomy §6 and SOURCE_EXPECTED in gold Cell 5 (VAST not in noninterruptible sources).

methodology_requirement: secure_cloud = True. Secure Cloud (datacenter-grade) only. Community Cloud excluded.
test_notes: Filter: .filter(F.col(secure_cloud) == True). RunPod returns aggregated prices per GPU type — no machine_id or gpu_frac dedup needed.

methodology_requirement: minimumBidPrice = interruptible floor (seller_ask_interruptible). securePrice = non-interruptible on-demand rate.
test_notes: bronze_runpod Cell 5 maps securePrice to seller_ask_noninterruptible and minimumBidPrice to seller_ask_interruptible. Verify both price types written per GPU model.

methodology_requirement: available = True. Only regions currently accepting deployments.
test_notes: Filter on bronze_shadeform.available. Non-available listings stored in Bronze for monitoring.

methodology_requirement: Providers collected directly (Nebius Lambda RunPod) excluded from Shadeform feed to prevent double-counting.
test_notes: EXCLUDED_CLOUDS = {runpod vast vastai nebius lambdalabs}. Applied in collection loop: if cloud.lower() in EXCLUDED_CLOUDS: continue.

methodology_requirement: Shadeform does not expose an interruptible/spot tier via the API. All records are seller_ask_noninterruptible.
test_notes: bronze_shadeform hardcodes price_type_canonical = seller_ask_noninterruptible. No interruptible tier available via API.

methodology_requirement: capacity_available = True. Sold-out rate cards are not executable prices.
test_notes: Filter: .filter(F.col(capacity_available) == True). Lambda_WARN in layer_reconciliation when zero obs expected (sold out).

methodology_requirement: is_cluster = False. Single-GPU instances only. Multi-GPU cluster handled by CLS pipeline.
test_notes: Filter: .filter(F.col(is_cluster) == False). Lambda cluster instances excluded from spot Silver; collected separately by bronze_lambda_cluster.

methodology_requirement: CRI-eligible models: H100_SXM B200_SXM. A100_SXM excluded (Lambda A100 is 40GB; CRI-A100 tracks 80GB SXM4).
test_notes: INSTANCE_MAP in bronze_lambda Cell 4 defines eligible instance names and their canonical gpu_model strings. Verify A100 absent from spot-eligible entries.

methodology_requirement: available = True. max_count > 0; location accepting deployments.
test_notes: Filter: .filter(F.col(available) == True). bronze_tensordock sets available = (max_count > 0) at collection time.

methodology_requirement: tier >= 3. Datacenter-grade only. Tier 1/2 hosts are consumer/prosumer hardware.
test_notes: TENSORDOCK_MIN_TIER = 3 in Silver Cell 1. Filter: .filter(F.col(tier) >= TENSORDOCK_MIN_TIER).

methodology_requirement: All Nebius records are Silver-eligible. Posted rate card; no availability state to filter.
test_notes: Nebius bronze rows pass directly to union with L40S CPU variant dedup applied. Verify no availability or reliability filter applied to Nebius in Silver Cell 5.

methodology_requirement: Nebius L40S priced on per-component basis. GPU component price only collected.
test_notes: bronze_nebius Cell 4 isolates GPU component price. Confirm no CPU/RAM component included in price_usd_per_gpu_hr for L40S.

methodology_requirement: On-demand (seller_ask_noninterruptible) and preemptible (seller_ask_interruptible) both collected.
test_notes: Nebius Bronze should produce two rows per GPU model per snapshot: one noninterruptible one interruptible. Verify in Cell 7 run summary.

methodology_requirement: No geographic filter. GPU compute globally fungible. US-only breakdown is supplementary only.
test_notes: Silver Cell 8 computes US-only supplementary breakdown (region.contains(US)) but does NOT filter. Confirm no US-only filter in Cell 5 or Cell 7 dedup write.

methodology_requirement: Window = 7 completed calendar days ending on as_of_date. window_start and window_end stored on every Gold row.
test_notes: WINDOW_DAYS = 7 in Cell 1. window_start = as_of_date minus 6 days. window_end = as_of_date. Both stamped on Gold row via F.lit().

section_title: Rolling Window — date resolution and backfill
methodology_requirement: as_of_date = today (CT) for scheduled runs. Backfill via widget — no code change permitted.
cell_reference: Cell 3 — DATE RESOLUTION AND RUN CONTEXT
test_notes: IS_BACKFILL flag set in Cell 3. Backfill runs logged prominently in Cell 7 output. Widget value recorded in Databricks job run metadata.

methodology_requirement: Gold reads Silver rows within window_start to window_end inclusive.
test_notes: Filter: to_date(collected_at) >= window_start AND <= window_end. All Silver-eligible obs in window contribute regardless of which day collected.

methodology_requirement: Index value = percentile_approx(price_usd_per_gpu_hr 0.5) across all pooled Silver-eligible obs. Not median-of-medians.
test_notes: Core aggregation: F.round(F.percentile_approx(price_usd_per_gpu_hr 0.5) 4).alias(index_value). Grouped by gpu_model only — price_type_canonical filter applied upstream in Cell 4 (noninterruptible only), so groupBy no longer includes price_type_canonical. All sources pooled.

methodology_requirement: obs_p25 obs_p75 obs_min obs_max published alongside index_value.
test_notes: percentile_approx at 0.25 and 0.75 computed in same groupBy. min and max via F.min / F.max.

methodology_requirement: Gold written via MERGE keyed on (as_of_date gpu_model price_type_canonical). Re-run updates existing row.
test_notes: MERGE condition: target.as_of_date = source.as_of_date AND target.gpu_model = source.gpu_model AND target.price_type_canonical = source.price_type_canonical.

methodology_requirement: Bronze runs 06:00 / 10:00 / 14:00 / 18:00 CT (daytime job). Full pipeline at 21:00 CT (evening job).
test_notes: Schedule enforced by Databricks job cron (job_id=310758214719449 daytime; job_id=622327517808386 evening). Not in notebook code — verify in Databricks job UI.

methodology_requirement: high: >=3 sources AND >=5 valid days. medium: >=2 AND >=3. low: all other.
test_notes: confidence_flag withColumn in Stage 2 of Cell 5. n_valid_days computed as calendar days where >=2 distinct sources had obs.

methodology_requirement: n_valid_days = calendar days in window where >=2 distinct sources each had >=1 Silver-eligible obs.
test_notes: valid_days subquery: groupBy(gpu_model price_type_canonical obs_date) countDistinct(source_id) >= 2 filter then count(obs_date).

methodology_requirement: Expected source counts locked: H100=5 A100=3 H200=3 L40S=4 B200=4 (noninterruptible). Interruptible=3 all models.
test_notes: SOURCE_EXPECTED dict in Cell 5 must match §4.1 table exactly. Interruptible entries removed from SOURCE_EXPECTED — Gold is noninterruptible only. Cross-check with EXPECTED_SOURCES in silver_spot_rates Cell 1 (Silver retains interruptible entries as Silver is neutral layer).

methodology_requirement: FULL: source_count == expected. REDUCED: source_count < expected but >=2. MINIMAL: source_count < 2.
test_notes: source_coverage withColumn in Stage 2 of Cell 5. Published on every Gold spot row. audit_pipeline Check Set 12 validates REDUCED/MINIMAL as WARN.

methodology_requirement: T2I Spread collected and retained in pipeline for internal analysis. Not published as headline index value.
test_notes: Interruptible rows are filtered out in gold_spot_rates Cell 4 — they are never written to gold/spot_rates Delta. Historical interruptible rows deleted from Gold Delta on 2026-03-23. export_to_github REQUIRED_CELLS contains noninterruptible only. T2I Spread analysis uses Silver data directly.

methodology_requirement: CLS-MM = flat median across all Bronze rows from RunPod Cluster and Lambda Cluster in 7-day window.
test_notes: Same percentile_approx(0.5) method as spot. Pooled across RunPod Cluster and Lambda Cluster Bronze rows within window.

methodology_requirement: CLS-ENT = CoreWeave posted rate card normalized per-GPU by dividing 8-GPU HGX node price by 8.
test_notes: bronze_coreweave_cluster divides scraped node price by 8 to produce per-GPU rate. Verify divisor = 8 in Cell 4.

methodology_requirement: CLS-ENT rate includes bundled CPU RAM storage InfiniBand. bundle_note field discloses this.
test_notes: bundle_note field written on every CoreWeave Bronze row. Must propagate to Gold cluster output.

methodology_requirement: SHA-256 of raw API response stamped on every Bronze row. Links Silver and Gold values to collection event.
test_notes: Same SHA-256 pattern in all Bronze notebooks: hash computed over sorted non-null records excluding snapshot_hash field itself. Stamped in collection loop Cell 6.

methodology_requirement: SHA-256 of raw API response stamped on every Bronze row. Links Silver and Gold values to collection event.
test_notes: RunPod: hash computed over sorted record list in Cell 6.

methodology_requirement: SHA-256 of raw API response stamped on every Bronze row. Links Silver and Gold values to collection event.
test_notes: Shadeform: hash computed in Cell 6.

methodology_requirement: SHA-256 of raw API response stamped on every Bronze row. Links Silver and Gold values to collection event.
test_notes: Lambda: hash computed in Cell 7 (one extra cell due to INSTANCE_MAP).

methodology_requirement: SHA-256 of raw API response stamped on every Bronze row. Links Silver and Gold values to collection event.
test_notes: TensorDock: hash computed in Cell 6.

methodology_requirement: SHA-256 of raw API response stamped on every Bronze row. Links Silver and Gold values to collection event.
test_notes: Nebius: hash computed in Cell 5.

methodology_requirement: Bronze tables append-only and never modified after write. Filter decisions applied exclusively at Silver.
cell_reference: Cell 7 - DEDUP + WRITE TO SILVER DELTA
test_notes: Silver Cell 7: dedup guard checks existing snapshot_hashes before write. Skips snapshots already in Silver (idempotent re-runs). Bronze itself uses appendOnly Delta property.

methodology_requirement: GPU API naming conventions change without notice. Source-specific known-set registries reviewed monthly.
cell_reference: Weekly source audit — new GPU model detection
test_notes: audit_sources maintains RUNPOD_KNOWN_IDS / SHADEFORM_KNOWN_MODELS / TENSORDOCK_CRI_V0_NAMES etc. Unknown model strings WARN for monthly review. Known-sets last updated 2026-03-22.

methodology_requirement: All 11 published CSV files must return HTTP 200 from ccir-data GitHub repo.
test_notes: SPOT_FILES + CLUSTER_FILES fetched via requests.get. 404 = FAIL. Cached in csv_cache for downstream checks.

methodology_requirement: Old CRI-H100-CLS path must 404. Active path must not be the retired path.
test_notes: RETIRED_PATHS list in audit_pipeline config. 200 on a retired path = FAIL.

methodology_requirement: Spot files must have 15 columns. Cluster files must have 18 columns.
test_notes: SPOT_COL_COUNT=15 CLUSTER_COL_COUNT=18 in config. Mismatch = FAIL.

methodology_requirement: Latest as_of_date in each file must equal today.
test_notes: Parsed from SP_AS_OF_DATE col. Stale date = FAIL.

methodology_requirement: source_coverage (FULL/REDUCED/MINIMAL) present on every spot row. REDUCED or MINIMAL = WARN.
test_notes: Filters to seller_ask_noninterruptible rows only. Empty cov_vals = WARN (pre-fix rows). MINIMAL = WARN with §4.3 disclosure note.

methodology_requirement: Today obs count vs 30-day rolling average. Ratio >1.5x = WARN (possible double-ingestion).
test_notes: INFLATION_THRESHOLD=1.5 INFLATION_MIN_ROWS=7. Spot: SP_TOTAL_OBS col. Cluster: CL_CLS_OBS col. WARN only — does not raise.

methodology_requirement: Index values must fall within per-index sanity bounds. Out-of-range = FAIL.
test_notes: SPOT_BOUNDS and CLUSTER_BOUNDS dicts in audit_pipeline config. Bounds per §8.2 table. FAIL triggers job failure notification.

methodology_requirement: API key accepted and returns valid response for all 6 spot sources plus CoreWeave.
test_notes: Check name pattern: {source}_auth. FAIL = auth breakage. audit_sources runs Sunday 07:00 CT — WARNs expected but FAILs trigger raise.

methodology_requirement: Current response keys compared against ADLS snapshot. New or removed fields = WARN.
test_notes: Snapshots stored at utils/schema_snapshots/{source}_schema.json. Updated when diff confirmed intentional. Versioned record of each source API response structure.
